summary: The 'nuniesmith/futures' repository is a sophisticated monorepo for a futures trading co-pilot, integrating Python ML-driven breakout detection (87% acc CNN), FastAPI/HTMX dashboard, NinjaTrader 8 C# strategies via Bridge, Docker Compose deployment, Redis/Postgres storage, and Prometheus/Grafana monitoring. Extensive testing (30+ files), detailed docs, and CI/CD shine, but critical TPT compliance (4PM hard flatten), unvalidated ONNX/PyTorch parity, and minor UI/security gaps prevent full production readiness. Overall, high-quality code with focused fixes needed for live prop trading.
priority_actions: Implement TPT 4:00 PM ET hard flatten in BreakoutStrategy.cs to ensure no overnight positions
Validate ONNX/PyTorch inference parity on v6 18-feature model and automate in CI
Deploy and test NT8 full session with logs verification for tabular dim=18 and TP3 mults
Add input validation/rate limiting to all FastAPI endpoints and rotate API secrets

findings.title: Missing TPT Hard Stop at 16:00 ET
findings.description: BreakoutStrategy.cs lacks time-based flatten for Take Profit Trader accounts, risking overnight holds and account termination as noted in multiple TODOs.
findings.recommendation: Add OnBarUpdate() guard: if TptMode && hour>=16 && positions>0, FlattenAll('TPT_HARD_STOP'); reset RiskBlocked at 18:00 ET. Test in live session.

findings.title: Unvalidated ONNX/PyTorch Model Parity
findings.description: TODO pending parity check on committed models despite v6 18-feature contract; risks divergence between Python engine and NT8.
findings.recommendation: Extend test_phase3_ema9_parity.py for full tabular batch inference; assert max abs diff <1e-4. Run on champion model and add to CI.

findings.title: Potential API Key Exposure in Docs/Env
findings.description: README/.env.example show placeholders; CI/CD secrets unconfirmed. No committed .env but risk if overlooked.
findings.recommendation: Verify .env in .gitignore; use GitHub secrets for CI/CD; add secret scanning in CI; scrub history if any keys committed.

findings.title: Monorepo Complexity from Python+C# Mix
findings.description: src/lib (Python) + src/ninja (C#/DLLs) in one repo; deploy scripts patch NT8 csproj, complicating branching/scaling.
findings.recommendation: Add C# linter (dotnet format) to CI; consider extracting ninja/ to separate repo if NT8 independent. Document build isolation.

findings.title: Committed DLLs Without Checksum Verification
findings.description: src/ninja/dll/ OnnxRuntime binaries committed; supply-chain tampering risk without validation.
findings.recommendation: Add SHA256 checksums in deploy_nt8.ps1; verify before copy. Prefer NuGet if NT8 supports.

findings.title: Forex Tick Precision Bug in UI Asset Cards
findings.description: Low-ATR forex (6E) shows collapsed entry/stop/TP due to 4-decimal rounding vs 5-decimal tick size.
findings.recommendation: In src/lib/services/web/main.py _compute_entry_zone(), use symbol-specific decimals from MICRO_CONTRACT_SPECS or ATR-based precision.

findings.title: No Unified DataResolver Across Services
findings.description: Cache→DB→API fetch duplicated; training lacks cache-first Kraken integration.
findings.recommendation: Implement DataResolver class for Redis→Postgres→Massive/Kraken with auto-backfill; use in engine/training.

findings.title: No C# Unit Tests
findings.description: Python has 30+ tests; C# relies on manual NT8 Analyzer.
findings.recommendation: Add NUnit tests for BreakoutStrategy.cs key logic (range builders, phases); integrate to CI via dotnet test.

findings.title: Missing Trading/Review UI Modes
findings.description: Dashboard cluttered during trading; no toggle for low-latency vs analysis views.
findings.recommendation: Add header toggle storing in localStorage; CSS .mode-trading/.mode-review to hide panels.

findings.title: FastAPI Endpoints Lack Input Validation
findings.description: data/api/* routers exposed without Pydantic validation/rate limits on all.
findings.recommendation: Add Depends(rate_limit) and strict models to all POST/PUT; audit for injection.

strengths: Comprehensive pytest suite (30+ files: ORB, ICT, risk, scheduler, integrations, parity)
Modular lib: analysis/core/services cleanly separated; feature_contract.json v6 enforces parity
Production Docker Compose (7 services w/ healthchecks), Tailscale CI/CD w/ Discord notifies
Observability: structlog, Prometheus/Grafana (training health dashboard provisioned)
Mature ML: 87.1% acc champion, ONNX export, balanced dataset gen, 13 breakout types
Excellent docs: README/todo.md/STRATEGY_PLAN.md; monorepo consolidation complete
weaknesses: Heavy deps (torch optional-GPU, onnxruntime); no pyproject lockfile
C# lacks tests/formatting; manual NT8 validation
UI noisy (Grok auto-poll, no modes); forex precision bug
Duplicated data fetch logic; Kraken training integration pending
tech_debt: Kraken keys in CI secrets + full training integration
Feature contract drift detection in C# loader
next_steps: Run tests/lint: pytest src/tests/ && ruff check src/
NT8 deploy: scripts/deploy_nt8.bat -Launch; check logs (dim=18, TP3 mults)
Live test: docker compose --profile monitoring up; monitor localhost:8180
Fix priorities: TPT stop, parity test, forex UI
